diaries.title: First Letter: The Creation
diaries.content:
My Love,

When we first met in Form 1, I was still a nerd, perhaps. Haha. Back then, I saw you as just an average girl. But whenever you talked about other boys, I would actually feel a little jealous. I knew that, at that time, I was probably not in your league, so from that day onwards, I stopped admiring you.

A few years later, I finally got a chance with you. But to be honest, at first, I wasn't trying to fall in love with you. I just wanted to try my luck and see where fate would take me. Haha, I'm sorry for being honest.

But after being with you for a while, I realised I couldn't lie to myself anymore. I knew that I wasn't just playing around, and I knew it would hurt you if you had already developed feelings for me. Then, a year later, I started flirting with you again. I don't even know what happened, but somewhere along the way, my feelings for you became more than just admiration.

And now, I have truly fallen in love with you.

And somehow, you are my girlfriend now. Honestly, I never thought that one day, you would be mine. From the girl I once thought was out of my league, to the person I now get to call mine, it still feels unreal sometimes.

I am who I am today because of you. You have become one of the biggest reasons behind my happiness, my hope, and my dreams. You mean more to me than I can ever properly explain.

I don't know what the future holds for us, but I know that I am grateful that fate somehow brought us here. From Form 1 until now, after all the years, all the changes, and everything that happened between us, I still can't believe that I ended up falling in love with you.

And now, I don't just admire you anymore.

I love you.

diaries.title: Second Letter: Fall Ill
diaries.content:
My dearest Raa,

I know you’re feeling really sick right now, and honestly, I’m really worried about you. I know you were supposed to sit for your Account exam today, and I can imagine how stressful and upsetting it must feel to miss it because you’re unwell.

But please don’t blame yourself too much, okay? Your health is more important than one exam. I know how hard you’ve worked, and I know you would have done your best if you were feeling well enough to go.

For now, please just rest and take care of yourself. Don’t worry about anything else. I really wish I could be there with you right now, taking care of you and making sure you’re okay.

Please get well soon, Raa. I love you so much, and I’m always here for you. ❤️

Love,
Rawr
